use_for: campaigns, sieges, roads, chokepoints, ports, supply and attrition
do_not_copy: Do not make it direct-player-command focused if the sim is observer-first.

use_for: inheritance, marriage politics, legitimacy and dynastic survival
do_not_copy: Do not let dynastic drama override material logistics.

use_for: generated history, strange deaths, forgotten ruins and historian disagreement
do_not_copy: Do not drown the player in unreadable noise.

use_for: frontier powers, mercenary captains, warlords and unstable borders
do_not_copy: Do not make everything about individual hero combat.

use_for: non-human peoples, rare mana and mythic cultures without abandoning realism
do_not_copy: No high-magic convenience or chosen-one engine.
